scripts.build: npm run build:chrome && npm run build:firefox
scripts.lint:firefox: npm run build:firefox && web-ext lint --source-dir dist/firefox
scripts.package:chrome: npm run build:chrome && web-ext build --source-dir dist/chrome --artifacts-dir web-ext-artifacts --filename browsersync-chrome-{version}.zip --overwrite-dest
scripts.package:firefox: npm run build:firefox && web-ext build --source-dir dist/firefox --artifacts-dir web-ext-artifacts --filename browsersync-firefox-{version}.zip --overwrite-dest
scripts.package: npm run package:chrome && npm run package:firefox
scripts.test:e2e: npm run build:chrome && xvfb-run -a node --test e2e/sync.e2e.mjs
